title: Man arrested after 3-year-old boy found injured in Cambridgeshire zoo crocodile enclosure
summary_full: A three-year-old boy is in critical condition after being found inside a crocodile enclosure at a Cambridgeshire zoo. A 30-year-old man was arrested on suspicion of attempted murder. Zoo staff are credited with a swift rescue. Police are investigating the incident and have urged the public not to speculate.
